sections.paragraph:
verb לחרוש

to plough; plot, design, devise

verb להיחרש

be ploughed; plotted, designed; become deaf

verb להתחרש

become deaf

verb להחריש

to keep silent; silence; deafen

masculine noun and adjective חרש (>>חירש)

deaf

adverb

secretly, silently, quietly, mutely, noiselessly

noun

craftsman, artisan, smith, wright
